headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Williams Companies (WMB) After Its 37% One-Year Rally?
summary: Investors may be wondering if Williams Companies at US$78.47 is pricing in too much optimism, or if there is still value left on the table. The stock has returned 1.0% over the past week, 8.7% over the past month, 29.0% year to date and 37.4% over the past year, which naturally raises questions about how that performance lines up with underlying value. Recent coverage has focused on Williams Companies as a large U.S. energy infrastructure business, with investors watching how it positions...
